channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gamedeveloper.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gamedeveloper.com

item.title: Landfall and Aggro Crab team up for Make-a-Wish game bundle
item.content:encoded:
Newsbrief: Digiphile has launched the Landfall x Aggro Crab Showcase, a game collection aimed at raising funds for Make-A-Wish in honor of World Wish Day.

The bundle, which kicked off yesterday, features eight games for $12. This includes Peak, Another Crab's Treasure, Haste, Content Warning, Totally Accurate Battle Simulator, Going Under, Subway Midnight, and Stick Fight: The Game.

There's also a charity tier available for an additional $5, for which 100 percent of the contribution goes to Make-A-Wish. It includes the digital soundtracks of four of the aforementioned games, as well as an exclusive commemorative artwork. When purchasing the bundle, you can opt to donate more to the charity.

The bundle will be available through May 12, or until keys sell out. At the time of writing, the collection has raised $2,312 for Make-A-Wish.

About the Author

Contributing Editor, News, GameDeveloper.com

Diego Nicolás Argüello is a freelance journalist and critic from Argentina. Video games helped him to learn English, so now he covers them for places like The New York Times, NPR, Rolling Stone, and more. He also runs Into the Spine, a site dedicated to fostering and supporting new writers, and co-hosted Turnabout Breakdown, a podcast about the Ace Attorney series. He’s most likely playing a rhythm game as you read this.



https://www.gamedeveloper.com/business/landfall-and-aggro-crab-team-up-for-make-a-wish-game-bundle
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
